name: cleanor
description: Zero-auth MCP: 22 tools — optimize/convert images (WebP/AVIF/JPEG), QR codes, cited storage & image-format data, plus 18 deterministic dev utilities (hash, HMAC, UUID, base64, JWT, JSON, regex, cron, unit/base convert, datetime, URL parse, diff, color, palette, slugify, count, SVG placeholder) LLMs get wrong.
